description_long: This is a modern double-sink bathroom vanity unit with a rectangular shape and a clean, minimalist design. The countertop is made of a light wood material, supporting two white ceramic sinks, each equipped with a sleek metallic faucet. Below the countertop, the vanity features a set of three central drawers flanked by two cabinet doors, all with integrated handles for a seamless look. The back of the unit is open to reveal plumbing and support structures, indicating practical access for maintenance. Above the vanity, a large rectangular mirror is mounted, accompanied by a narrow wooden shelf for small items. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with a focus on functionality and visual simplicity, suitable for urban residential or commercial bathroom settings.
description: A modern double-sink bathroom vanity with a wood countertop, white ceramic sinks, integrated drawers and cabinets, and a large mirror with a shelf. The design is sleek and functional, ideal for urban bathrooms.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the vanity, the thickness of the wood countertop, and the profile of the sinks and mirror.
description_view_1: Front view displaying both sinks, faucets, the three central drawers, two cabinet doors, and the full width of the mirror and shelf.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, highlighting the same depth and profile features from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing the open back of the vanity, visible plumbing, and support structures beneath the sinks.
